title: Plesioneuron tuberculatum
taxonomy: Plesioneuron tuberculatum is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Plesioneuron and is part of the family of vascular plants known as Polypodiopsida. The Polypodiaceae family is a group of ferns commonly known as the polypody ferns. Within the Polypodiaceae family, Plesioneuron tuberculatum is classified as a member of the order Polypodiales. This order includes a wide variety of ferns that are characterized by their simple leaves and spore-producing structures.

intro: Plesioneuron tuberculatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a type of fern.
